name: AnalysisCompositeBeam
summary: The AnalysisCompositeBeam class contains information related to analysis composite beams.

constructors.name: AnalysisCompositeBeam
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisCompositeBeam class

properties.name: Composite
properties.summary: Indicates whether the beam is composite.

properties.name: ConcreteStrength
properties.summary: The strength of the concrete of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: RibDirection
properties.summary: The direction of the rib of the analysis composite beam (in the global coordinate system).

properties.name: RibHeight
properties.summary: The height of the rib of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: RibWidth
properties.summary: The width of the rib of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: SlabMaterial
properties.summary: The slab material of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: SlabThickness
properties.summary: The thickness of the slab of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: SlabWidthLeft
properties.summary: The left width of the slab of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: SlabWidthRight
properties.summary: The right width of the slab of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: StudDiameter
properties.summary: The diameter of the stud of the analysis composite beam.

properties.name: StudLength
properties.summary: The length of the stud of the analysis composite beam.
